description: Improve script quality automatically by combining the existing editorial, narration, retention, and factual checks into one deterministic gate, then allowing at most one safe repair attempt before the storyboard continues.

userStories.title: Create a unified deterministic script-quality report
userStories.description: As the production pipeline, I need one trustworthy report that combines the existing editorial contract, narration readiness, and NARRACAOPRO factual integrity checks without trusting scores generated by the model itself.
acceptanceCriteria: Export assessAutomaticScriptQuality from the scriptQuality barrel.
Return a 0-100 overall score, passed flag, hardBlockers, recommendations, and separate editorial, narration, factual, and retention dimensions.
Treat missing or failed factual integrity as a hard blocker instead of compensating for it with a high creative score.
Produce stable deterministic output for identical input.
Add regression tests for a strong script, a weak script, and a script with unsupported factual causality.
userStories.notes: Reuse assessEditorialContract, assessNarrationReadiness, and assessNarracaoProIntegrity; do not create a parallel factual checker.

userStories.title: Detect retention problems before asset generation
userStories.description: As a creator, I want the automatic report to identify weak hooks, delayed promises, repetitive narration, poor payoff, and unsuitable pacing before expensive media is generated.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deterministic retention diagnostics for hook specificity, early promise delivery, repeated sentence openings or phrases, pacing, and final payoff.
Use separate thresholds for SHORTS and LONGO formats.
Distinguish blocking problems from advisory improvements.
Do not reject a script solely because it lacks a CTA when its editorial payoff is complete.
Add tests covering generic greetings, clickbait without payoff, excessive repetition, and a valid high-retention script.
userStories.notes: Keep the checks explainable; every deduction must generate a concrete reason.

userStories.title: Build a fact-preserving automatic repair prompt
userStories.description: As the pipeline, I need a repair instruction that fixes only diagnosed weaknesses while preventing the model from inventing claims, sources, entities, numbers, or causal relationships.
acceptanceCriteria: Export a repair-prompt builder that receives the original script, unified report, verified facts, sources, format, and strategy.
Require preservation of verified claims and explicit uncertainty language.
Forbid new facts, sources, named entities, numbers, and causal claims that are absent from the supplied evidence.
Request structured JSON containing the repaired narrative, hook, change summary, and preserved factual anchors.
Add tests proving that the prompt contains the hard blockers, permitted evidence, and anti-invention constraints.
userStories.notes: This story creates instructions only; it must not call an AI provider.

userStories.title: Implement a single safe repair pass
userStories.description: As the pipeline, I want a testable orchestration function that attempts one repair only when needed and accepts the candidate only when objective quality improves without weakening factual integrity.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a provider-independent orchestration function using injected evaluate and repair callbacks.
Skip repair when the original report already passes.
Attempt repair no more than once per script.
Reject the candidate when its score does not improve, factual integrity fails, or hard blockers increase.
Return the selected script plus before/after reports, attempted, accepted, and rejectionReason metadata.
Add tests for accepted improvement, rejected regression, factual regression, callback failure, and already-passing input.
userStories.notes: Never loop recursively and never hide the original script.

userStories.title: Integrate automatic quality repair into script generation
userStories.description: As a Lumiera user, I want generated scripts to be audited and safely improved automatically before visual prompts and narration assets are produced.
acceptanceCriteria: Run the unified audit after the script JSON is parsed and before expensive visual or audio generation.
Use the existing configured text-generation provider for at most one repair request.
Persist automatic_script_quality and automatic_script_repair metadata in the storyboard result.
Keep the original script when repair fails, times out, worsens quality, or violates factual integrity.
Do not modify the existing visual-prompt, TTS, rendering, or publishing behavior.
Focused tests, server syntax check, and the complete backend test suite pass.
userStories.notes: This is the only story allowed to wire the feature into server.js. Review concurrent server.js work before starting the loop.
